title: Absurdly Amazing Alloys
description: A mod that adds a few metals (and a few gems!) to your world. Yet another material mod. Made for ModFest 26!
body:
![5 armor sets (ruby, sapphire, topaz, citrine, steel)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/165278a79b0f116c2c4364ae9c55559cd41cbdc1.png)
Alloys, ores, sparkly gems, and more! A material mod for a modern era.
--- **Absurdly Amazing Alloys** is a mod that adds: - Nine new materials with no use beyond tools and armor! - A new method of creating mixtures of metals! - *Mixtures of metals!!* - Unbalanced deluxe weaponry to suit your ~~murderous~~ combative needs! Partially inspired by [Easy Emerald Tools & More](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-emerald-tools-fabric) by kwpugh (it was one of the first mods we had ever played). Made for ModFest 26: Animation, Affection, **Academia**!!
